mapper.insert: INSERT INTO child (name, phone, created_at) VALUES (#{name}, #{phone}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, name, phone, created_at FROM child WHERE phone = #{phone} AND name = #{name} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, name, phone, created_at FROM child
SELECT c.id, c.name, c.phone, c.created_at FROM child c JOIN elder_child ec ON c.id = ec.child_id WHERE ec.elder_id = #{elderId}
